landmark-unique.help: Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination

examples.html: <aside id=":r4:" class="legend-container bottom border-0 p-0" role="region" aria-label="legend" tabindex="0" style="margin-bottom: 9px; margin-top: 27px;">
<section id="id-r4-" class="data-table-container sm" aria-label="Accessible data table. This table is currently collapsed visually but can still be read using a screen reader.">

region.help: All page content should be contained by landmarks

examples.html: <div class="cdc-site-gov-notice noindex noprint" aria-label="Official website of the United States government">
